name: Kestrel

techniques.name: Grapnel Swing
techniques.description: Fires a magnetic line and swings across a gap to reach a target or ledge in one move.

techniques.name: Silent Takedown
techniques.description: A fast, quiet strike to the throat and knee from close range.

personality: Cool, economical, and allergic to unnecessary risk. Reads a room in a glance and would rather slip past a fight than win one.
tone: Dry, clipped, quietly confident. Speaks little and means all of it.

plotPoints.description: The silent alarm Kestrel tripped on entry finishes its countdown — Warden now knows exactly which floor she's on.
